skills.name: Crush
skills.description: Lunge with your spear forward to pierce enemies in front. When you use the skill, you gain a buff that temporarily ignores some enemy Defense. Applies Stun on slowed enemies for 1.5 seconds.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 2
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
Ignore Defense by CaptionRatio %
Buff Duration: 5 seconds

skills.name: Joust
skills.description: Charge forward to lunge your spear at the enemy and destroy magic circles. The target becomes silenced, rendering them unable to use basic attacks and skills.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 6
Targets: CaptionRatio3
[Silence] Duration: 2 seconds

skills.name: Unhorsing
skills.description: Fix the grip on your spear and strike your enemy downward, knocking them off of their companion. Deals additional damage to mounted enemies and Beast types.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 3
AoE Attack Ratio SkillSR
Unable to mount Companion for 5 seconds if fallen

skills.name: Quintain
skills.description: Attack by reaching out the spear.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 2
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Initiate
skills.description: Strengthen your will before the battle. Increases the chances for you to penetrate the enemy's Block.

skills.name: Prevent
skills.description: Immediately nullifies [Slow], [Immobility] and [Arrest] debuffs on use and grants immunity to the three skills while the skill is activated.
skills.effect_text:
Immediately removes [Slow], [Immobility], [Arrest] and [Stun]
[Slow], [Immobility], [Arrest] and [Stun] immunity duration: CaptionTime seconds
Cooldown reduction: - CaptionRatio seconds

skills.name: Rhongomiant
skills.description: Rush towards the enemy and deal damage. Upon hitting an enemy, you stop and deal increased damage based on the distance traveled. Rhongomiant cannot be evaded or blocked and enemies are stunned for 2 seconds.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 4
Critical Rate +100%

skills.name: Gigante Marcha
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 10
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

attributes.name: Lancer: Knockdown Chance
attributes.description: * Basic attacks knock down enemies with 1% chance per attribute level

attributes.name: Crush: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Crush] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Joust: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Joust] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Unhorsing: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Unhorsing] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Quintain: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Quintain] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Rhongomiant: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Rhongomiant] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Quintain: Sure Victory
attributes.description:
* Applies Quintain Damage 30% x 8 hits to enemies under the Crush debuff

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Gigante Marcha: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Gigante Marcha] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Prevent: Extend
attributes.description:
* Extends the duration of [Prevent] by 0.2 sec per attribute level

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Rhongomiant: Shield Crush
attributes.description:
* Damage dealt with [Rhongomiant] ignores the enemy's Shield's defense values

* Enemies hit by the skill have their Shield unequipped and become unable to equip it for 3 sec

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Unhorsing: Topple
attributes.description:
* Targets struck by [Unhorsing] become knocked down on the spot.

* (Applies also against targets that are not mounted)

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Initiate: Heavy Cavalry
attributes.description:
* Reduces Movement Speed by 5 during [Initiate]. Increases the physical defense of the caster's equipped Plate armor by 2% per attribute level

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: [Arts] Rhongomiant: Duel!
attributes.description: * Enemies hit by [Rhongomiant] are inflicted with the [Duel] debuff for 20 seconds.Damage received by the caster from the target with the debuff increases by 10%, but the Final Damage of the caster's Lancer skill increases by 20%.

attributes.name: [Arts] Crush: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Crush] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Joust: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Joust] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Unhorsing: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Unhorsing] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Quintain: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Quintain] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Rhongomiant: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Rhongomiant] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Gigante Marcha: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Gigante Marcha] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Joust: Destroy Base
attributes.description:
* [Joust] skill changed to casting skill

* Casting is possible for up to 2 seconds, increases the distance of rushing toward front and damage given to the enemy as the time gets longer.
